title: machaeranthera juncea
intro: Machaeranthera juncea, also known as green rabbit's-brush, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Machaeranthera juncea include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Machaeranthera juncea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
